p.style: border: black 1px dotted; background-color: #EEEEEE; padding: 8px; margin-bottom: 8px

div.p: Expansion from tx.fhir.org based on codesystem v3 Code System ActCode version 2018-08-12
A grantor's assent to the terms of an agreement offered by a grantee without an opportunity for to dissent to any terms.

pre.code:
Comment: Acceptance of a grantee's terms pertaining, for example, to permissible activities, purposes of use, handling caveats, expiry date, and revocation policies.
Usage Note: Opt-in with no opportunity for a grantor to restrict certain permissions sought by the grantee is considered "basic consent".
Examples:
Healthcare: A patient [grantor] signs a provider's [grantee's] consent directive form, which lists permissible collection, access, use, or disclosure activities, purposes of use, handling caveats, and revocation policies. Non-healthcare: An employee [grantor] signs an employer's [grantee's] non-disclosure and non-compete agreement.

p.style: border: black 1px dotted; background-color: #EEEEEE; padding: 8px; margin-bottom: 8px

div.p: Expansion performed internally based on codesystem CodeSystem of types for a consent v2.0.0-ballot.2 (CodeSystem)

p.style: border: black 1px dotted; background-color: #EEEEEE; padding: 8px; margin-bottom: 8px

div.p: Expansion performed internally based on codesystem CodeSystem of NCPeH Request Types v2.0.0-ballot.2 (CodeSystem)

div.style: border: black 1px dotted; background-color: #EEEEEE; padding: 8px; margin-bottom: 8px

li.a: codesystem TIFLOW XBORDER Operation Outcome Details CS v2.0.0-ballot.2 (CodeSystem)
codesystem TI Operation Outcome Details CodeSystem v1.3.0 (CodeSystem)
codesystem TIFLOW Operation Outcome Details CS v2.0.0-ballot.2 (CodeSystem)

tr.td: Keine einlösbaren Verordnungen gefunden
No redeemable prescriptions were found for the requested query scope
EU-Einlösung nicht aktiviert
The addressed task is not activated for EU redemption
Ländercode ungültig
The provided country code is not supported for ePrescription or eDispensation processing
Zugriffsrolle nicht zulässig
The authenticated actor role is not permitted to execute this operation
Einwilligung erforderlich
A valid consent is required to execute this operation
Zugriffsberechtigung ungültig
The requested access permission is invalid or not sufficient
Authentifizierter Akteur ist nicht Eigentümer
The authenticated actor is not the owner of the addressed task

button.data-clipboard-text: <coding><system value="https://gematik.de/fhir/tiflow/CodeSystem/tiflow-operation-outcome-details-cs"><version value="2.0.0-ballot.2"><code value="TIFLOW_AUTH_NOT_OWNER"><display value="Authentifizierter Akteur ist nicht Eigentümer"></coding>
button.title: Click to Copy as Coding

tr.td: AccessCode stimmt nicht überein
The provided access code does not match the access code assigned to the task
Task-Status passt nicht
The task is in a status that does not allow execution of this operation
Task-ID erforderlich
The operation requires a task id in the request
KVNR stimmt nicht überein
The KVNR in the request does not match the KVNR assigned to the task context

button.data-clipboard-text: <coding><system value="https://gematik.de/fhir/tiflow/CodeSystem/tiflow-operation-outcome-details-cs"><version value="2.0.0-ballot.2"><code value="TIFLOW_KVNR_MISMATCH"><display value="KVNR stimmt nicht überein"></coding>
button.title: Click to Copy as Coding

tr.td: Einwilligung fehlt
No required consent was found for this operation
AccessCode ungültig
The provided access code is syntactically invalid

title.value: TIFLOW XBORDER Operation Outcome Details VS
